data.title: Plume Selected for Mastercard's Start Path Program
data.description: Recently, Mastercard officially announced the selection of Plume, one of only five companies worldwide, to join its Start Path program. Competition for the Start Path program is fierce, open only to teams with established products and revenue generation capabilities. Plume's selection not only signifies the recognition of its products and business model by the international payment giant, but also guarantees exclusive support from Mastercard's ecosystem. Recent data indicates that over 50% of global RWA holders have already invested in the Plume network. With over 200 RWAfi projects and numerous institutional partnerships, Plume is rapidly establishing its leading position in the on-chain capital market.

data.title: Australia Plans Fines Up To 10% Of Turnover For Crypto Rule Breaches
data.description:
Australia’s draft law would fine crypto platforms up to 10% of annual turnover or A$16. 5m for breaching new licensing and conduct rules.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/australia-plans-10-pct-turnover-fine-crypto-rule-breaches/

data.title: WLTH officially launches tokenized investment channel, opening up opportunities for Asian investors to participate in Kraken's $17.7 billion valuation.
data.description: Common Wealth (WLTH) has launched tKRAK, a tokenized investment opportunity, providing Asian institutional and retail investors with access to Kraken, a top US cryptocurrency exchange with a reference valuation of $17.7 billion. This tokenized economic interest, tradable on the WLTH market, brings previously inaccessible, premium investment opportunities to the masses. Founded in 2011, Kraken is one of the world's oldest and most trusted cryptocurrency exchanges, serving over 190 countries, with over 10 million users and projected revenue of $1.5 billion by 2024. tKRAK is now open to the public in Asia, with a minimum investment of just $20 and a maximum individual investment of $59,000. The WLTH investment platform leverages tokenization technology to provide investors with transparent token tracking, real-time updates, and a simple participation process. Investors will receive fragmented ERC-721 tokens representing their economic interests, with potential exit options including dividends, strategic acquisitions, an IPO, or subsequent rounds of financing. "We're committed to lowering the barrier to entry for high-quality projects," said Timothy McCann, co-founder and CEO of WLTH Investment Platform. "Kraken's rapid growth and regulatory compliance advantages position it for a leading position in this new industry cycle. We're honored to bring these scarce investment opportunities to the masses." tKRAK subscriptions are now available on the WLTH platform, and secondary market trading is available through the $WLTH Marketplace. Seize this opportunity to become an early investor in one of the world's top crypto unicorns.

data.title: Binance Alpha Removes GAIN’s 4x Trading Volume Bonus
data.description: Binance announced on X that due to significant fluctuations in the TVL and price of the GriffinAI (GAIN) token, to protect user rights, Binance Alpha has canceled its 4x Alpha trading volume bonus as of September 25 at 00:00 (UTC).

data.title: Ten addresses received a total of 210,000 ETH in 6 hours, worth approximately $863 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a total of 10 wallet addresses received a total of 210,452 ETH in the past 6 hours, worth approximately US$863 million. The sources of funds include Kraken, Galaxy Digital OTC, BitGo and FalconX.

data.title: Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US Stock ETF Approved, Investing in Assets Beyond BTC and ETH
data.description: Nate Geraci, president of The ETF Store, announced in a post that the Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF has been approved under the SEC's new universal listing standards. The product will be able to hold crypto assets other than BTC and ETH, including XRP, SOL, and XLM.

data.title: One address bought GAIN at a low price and made a floating profit of $107,000 in one hour.
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Ai Yi @ai_9684 xtpa, the address 0x951…141de bought GAIN almost at the short-term bottom, investing $20,200 at an average price of $0.00625. The floating profit reached $107,000 within an hour, with a return rate of approximately 530%. No selling action has been seen so far.

data.title: Tether Treasury Mints $1 Billion USDT on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert reported that at 10:22 AM UTC+8, Tether Treasury minted 1 billion USDT on the Ethereum blockchain, valued at approximately $1.00345 billion.

data.title: GAIN Project Faces Major Security Breach Due to Configuration Error
data.description: According to PANews, the GAIN project has suffered a significant security breach due to a LayerZero Peer configuration error. Analysis by GoPlus reveals that attackers exploited this vulnerability by initializing an additional Peer on the Ethereum blockchain and minting TTTTT tokens. This allowed them to bypass cross-chain verification and excessively issue 5 billion GAIN tokens on the Binance Smart Chain. The incident bears similarities to the previous Yala attack, resulting in a dramatic price drop of over 90% for GAIN. Users are advised to temporarily cease interactions with the project to prevent potential losses.

data.title: ETH fell below 4100 USDT, down 2.1% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market data shows that ETH has fallen below 4100 USDT, currently trading at 4099 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 2.1%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: Trader Bonk Guy once bought 3.246 million ASTER at an average price of $0.0922
data.description: Trader Bonk Guy posted on the X platform to clarify that there were misunderstandings regarding his ASTER transactions. He stated that he had purchased approximately 3.246 million ASTER tokens, with a transaction value of approximately $299,000 and an average purchase price of $0.0922. His current position has a floating profit of approximately $7.1 million, having established a position a week ago. He added that he had only previously consolidated the tokens and transferred them to a public wallet, not opened a new position.

data.title: Planet Morning News | September 25
data.description: 1. Bitwise: Ethereum treasury strategies are becoming mainstream, and ETH is no longer limited to hedging or speculation tools. 2. The US government may face its first shutdown since the winter of 2018-19. 3. Meteora proposes to distribute 3% of TGE reserves to Jupiter stakers in the form of liquidity position NFTs. 4. US Senator Warren calls for an investigation into the Trump family's overseas cryptocurrency transactions. 5. GSR submits an application to the US SEC to launch a digital asset treasury company ETF and multiple crypto funds. 6. CZ: Reachme's performance has fallen short of expectations, and the project is advised to explore token issuance after achieving product-market fit. 8. Solana treasury company SOL Strategies plans to raise $25 million through a rights offering to increase its SOL holdings. 9. Aster: Increase the weighting of holding time points to 5x. 11. Franklin Templeton integrated the Benji platform into BNB Chain; 12. The board of directors of SOL Treasury DeFi Development approved a US$100 million share repurchase; 14. SUI Group disclosed that it holds over 105 million SUI tokens, with a holding value of nearly US$360 million; 15. Bloomberg analysts: ETFs have additional advantages over crypto tokens, such as regulatory protection; 16. Hyperliquid's stablecoin USDH officially launched after winning a bid on Native Markets; 17. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority: Currently, no offshore RMB stablecoins are issued in Hong Kong; 18. K33: The derivatives market reflects defensiveness and remains cautious about the recent performance of BTC; 19. Amplify ETFs submitted an application to the US SEC for a SOL and XRP options income ETF; 20. Blockchain analysis company Elliptic received a strategic investment from HSBC; 21. Big Pi, a company specializing in blockchain and other fields 22. Stablecoin startup Bastion secured $14.6 million in funding, led by Coinbase; 23. Solana ecosystem perpetual contract DEX BULK secured $8 million in seed funding, led by Robot Ventures and others; 24. Crypto computing development company Belfort secured $6 million in seed funding, led by Vsquared Ventures; 26. Prediction market Melee secured $3.5 million in funding, with participation from Variant and others.

data.title: Gold hits most overbought level in 45 years as ETF demand spikes
data.description:
Gold just broke yet another record. As of this week, it hit its most overbought level in 45 years, with a monthly RSI of 89. 72. That’s the highest RSI for gold since 1980. Anyone who follows charts knows that anything above 70 usually signals overbought territory. So, near 90? That’s insane. And this is happening […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gold-most-overbought-level-in-45-years/

data.title: Coinbase, Sony Get In On The Stablecoin Action
data.description:
Stablecoin infrastructure provider Bastion announced a $14. 6 million funding round led by Coinbase Ventures, with participation from Sony’s venture arm, Samsung Next, a16z Crypto, and Hashed, as Fortune Crypto reported on Sept. 24
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/24/coinbase-sony-get-in-on-the-stablecoin-action/
